headline: Robinhood Markets (HOOD) Is Up 28.1% After Launching Agentic AI Trading And Credit Card Tools
summary: In late May 2026, Robinhood Markets expanded its platform by launching AI-powered Agentic Trading and an Agentic Credit Card, advancing into automated investing, payments, and new areas like prediction markets and children’s IRA-style “Trump Accounts.” At the same time, Robinhood secured fresh regulatory and ecosystem support, including approval to offer U.S. perpetual futures and backing for the Open Transaction Layer crypto protocol, signaling a broader push to embed its services across...

headline: IBM Shares Surge as Old Clip of Trump Praise Recirculates Online
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A nearly six-month old video of Donald Trump praising International Business Machines Corp.’s CEO sent the shares surging almost 9% on Monday, adding more than $24 billion to the company’s stock-market value. headline: Crypto exchange Binance rolls out trading in US stocks, ETFs
summary: Crypto exchange Binance said on Monday it has launched stock and exchange-traded ‌fund trading for customers on its platform, ‌expanding beyond digital assets into traditional financial markets.  • Binance said users will have access to more than 7,000 U.S. stocks and exchange-traded funds on its app, in addition to crypto ‌tokens.  • Customers will ⁠also be able to buy fractional shares, allowing them to invest in portions of ⁠stocks with as little as $5, the crypto firm added.
